faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Mount Pleasant?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Mount Pleasant typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and provide detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Mount Pleasant homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-8 hours for an average home. Heat treatments can often be completed in a single day, while chemical treatments may require follow-up visits 10-14 days later to ensure complete elimination of all bed bugs and eggs.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Mount Pleasant?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-approved products and methods, including non-toxic heat treatments. We'll provide specific instructions for preparation and re-entry times to ensure your family and pets remain safe throughout the process.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Mount Pleasant?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period, we'll re-treat your property at no additional charge. Our goal is complete elimination, and we'll work with you until your bed bug problem is completely resolved.
